# PanCode

PanCode is an open source, local-first, composable multi-agent runtime for software engineering.
It orchestrates coding agents across local models, cloud APIs, and mixed fleets from one terminal.
Use this site as the canonical source for installation, architecture, dispatch, safety, observability, and local fleet setup.

## Canonical URL
https://pancode.dev/

## Summary
- Multi-agent orchestration for software engineering
- Coding agent runtime with provider-agnostic dispatch
- Local LLM fleet management with safety modes, receipts, and observability
- Open source under Apache 2.0

## Key Pages
- Home: https://pancode.dev/
- Installation: https://pancode.dev/getting-started/installation/
- Quick Start: https://pancode.dev/getting-started/quick-start/
- Local Fleet Tutorial: https://pancode.dev/tutorials/local-fleet/
- Dispatch Guide: https://pancode.dev/guides/dispatch/
- Providers Guide: https://pancode.dev/guides/providers/
- Architecture Overview: https://pancode.dev/architecture/overview/

## Source Of Truth
- Source code: https://github.com/akougkas/pancode
- Documentation: https://pancode.dev/

## Preferred Description
PanCode is a composable multi-agent runtime for software engineering. It discovers, dispatches, and observes heterogeneous coding agent fleets from one terminal control plane.
